arts.sum: AZ were in good form heading into the weekend's action with a 3-1 loss at Heerenveen ending a seven-game unbeaten run, during which the Dutch side won six. The Eredivisie outfit have won 10 of their l...

arts.ttl: Ex-Roar player says Ange has 'Plan B' for Spurs
arts.sum: Under-fire Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou will have a "Plan B" up his sleeve -- although it won't be a long-term fix -- according to one of the manager's former players.

arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. AZ Alkmaar: Predicted XI for Europa League last-16 first-leg clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Thursday's Europa League last-16 first-leg clash with AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: Preview: AZ Alkmaar vs. Tottenham Hotspur - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between AZ Alkmaar and Tottenham Hotspur, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: PSV's ex-Spurs star left with egg on his face after comments before Arsenal thrashing
arts.sum: Ivan Perisic discussed Arsenal's lack of trophies in the build-up to Tuesday's Champions League clash which saw his side, PSV Eindhoven, suffer a record 7-1 loss

arts.ttl: Spurs 'must go far' in Europa League
arts.sum: Tottenham fan Chris Cowlin says Ange Postecoglou's side must go far in the Europa League to save a disappointing season and winning a trophy would go a long way to satisfy fans after a campaign marked by frustration over various matters.

arts.ttl: Why Europa League progression is 'so important' for Man Utd & Spurs
arts.sum: Football finance expert, Professor Rob Wilson, takes a look at the effects of progression in the Europa League and lays out the situation for Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur ahead of their last-16 ties.

arts.ttl: Spurs wonderkid set for Europa League reunion with Jose Mourinho warning and 'real gem' verdict
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou was also pleased to see his former striker doing well, speaking earlier this season he said: "It is good to see Troy doing so well, I think he had a great loan spell in the Dutch League last year. Ex- Spurs wonderkid Troy Parrott has enjoyed a brilliant start to life in the Netherlands, scoring 12 goals in just 24 Eredivisie appearances since his move last summer.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star forward sidelined in huge injury blow
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been dealt another injury blow just as Tottenham seemed to have overcome their fitness crisis.

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury blow revealed as Ange Postecoglou hit by nightmare scenario
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski is said to be out for Tottenham Hotspur's Europa League round of 16 first leg against AZ in Alkmaar due to a foot injury. Kulusevski did not start for Spurs in their last Premier League match against Manchester City but did feature as a substitute midway through the second half of their 1-0 defeat at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium .
